title: rosa pumila var. subnigra
intro: Rosa pumila var. subnigra, also known as the dwarf black rose, is a compact and shrub-like variety of the Rosa pumila species, characterized by its dark green leaves and black-petaled flowers. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Rosa pumila var. subnigra has been employed for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting against infections, and providing antioxidant effects. Rosa pumila var. subnigra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
